description.ko: 수학적 정밀함과 디지털 혼돈의 교차점을 통해 KURO-X의 정체성을 탐구하며, 조각난 기하학적 형상과 고에너지 글리치 아티팩트를 특징으로 합니다.
description.en: An exploration of the KURO-X identity through the intersection of mathematical precision and digital chaos, featuring fractured geometric shapes and high-energy glitch artifacts.

prompt: KURO-X brand identity reimagined in a geometric glitch aesthetic, sharp polygonal fragments, displaced digital pixels, rhythmic grid patterns, chromatic aberration, neon cyan and magenta accents on a deep charcoal background, hyper-detailed tech textures, 8k resolution, vector-style complexity, motion blur artifacts.
